texto: If you have one wish, wish for everything to be exactly as it is. Then wait patiently for your wish to come true.
explicacao: Citação de Stephen Russell sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “If you have one wish, wish for everything to be exactly as it is. Then wait patiently for your wi…” articula reflexao, tao, wishes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como wishes e wishful-thinking.

frase_original: If you have one wish, wish for everything to be exactly as it is. Then wait patiently for your wish to come true.

texto: For a few moments, attune your mind to the idea of harmony and peaceful coexistence flowing among all peoples and nations.The source of this idea is deep within your heart.As you calmly breathe in and out, picture it radiating from you like a fine, colored vapor gradually covering the face of the earth.See it enter the hearts of everyone, especially those stuck in the mad zones.Feel it circulate everywhere until it comes all the way round and back to you.This is love in action.The source of this love is the Tao.Savor this.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Stephen Russell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “For a few moments, attune your mind to the idea of harmony and peaceful coexistence flowing among…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, love, paz pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de paz e taoism.
